====''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]''====
In ''[[JN112|Helping the Hometown Hero!]]'', Hala hosted a party to welcome {{an|Lillie}} and her family back to Alola after they found Mohn. The next day, Hala watched a [[Battle Royal]] match between {{Ash}}, {{an|Kiawe}}, {{an|Gladion}}, and {{an|Professor Kukui}}.
